title: Conflict
doc_html:
§628.  Conflict

In the event of a conflict between the provisions of this Chapter and Revised Statutes 37:1261 et seq., the provisions of R.S. 37:1261 et seq. shall govern.  

Acts 1970, No. 585, §1.
doc_text:
§628.  Conflict

Acts 1970, No. 585, §1.
